```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;">

 <div style="text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#D45F47;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.6em;">most people get this layer wrong</div>

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:stretch;gap:0;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);text-align:left;margin-bottom:0.8em;">

  <div style="flex:1;background:#FCEEEC;padding:0.8em 1em;border-right:2px dashed #F2B5A8;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#7A2418;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">✕ vague</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;font-style:italic;">"is this good?"</div>
  </div>

  <div style="flex:1.3;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.8em 1em;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#1F5E54;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">✓ concrete</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;font-style:italic;">"satisfies criteria 1, 2, 3 at score N?"</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.5em;text-align:left;">
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.6em 0.8em;border-left:3px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.15em;">few-shot calibration</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Example outputs with score breakdowns.</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.6em 0.8em;border-left:3px solid #C4881A;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#C4881A;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.15em;">hard thresholds</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Sprint fails below score. No "kinda fine".</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.6em 0.8em;border-left:3px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.15em;">interactive (not static)</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Click, type, navigate, hit the API.</div>
  </div>
 </div>

</div>
```
